_comment: Authoritative list of MCP servers dt-pilot knows how to launch. Set-McpServerState.ps1 and New-McpSessionConfig.ps1 read this file. 'alwaysEnabled' servers cannot be disabled via chat-driven toggles. 'requiresEnv' and 'acceptsOneOfEnv' document the environment variables each server needs at runtime; Test-DynatraceMcpReadiness.ps1 enforces a hardcoded subset for the 'dynatrace' server today, and broader catalog-driven enforcement is on the roadmap.

servers.description: Official Dynatrace MCP server (DQL, problems, vulnerabilities, entities, Davis Copilot). Wraps @dynatrace-oss/dynatrace-mcp-server via the Start-DynatraceMcpServer.ps1 launcher.
Library / package documentation lookup. Off by default. Enable only if you actively want documentation snippets injected into agent context.

Official HashiCorp Terraform MCP server (registry lookups, provider / module discovery, workspace context). Off by default; enable when actively authoring .tf files. Provides no Dynatrace-specific surface -- the Dynatrace MCP server still handles entity / DQL / problem reads.
